'''âs-sh-dh''' ('''kasashadh''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:imblaze|imblaze]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-sh-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:imblaze|imblaze]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âs-sh-dh
|-
! Lemma
| kasashadh
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thisashadh|thisashadh]] || [[word:jisashadh|jisashadh]] || [[word:shisashadh|shisashadh]] || [[word:kisashadh|kisashadh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthusashadh|thuthusashadh]] || [[word:jujusashadh|jujusashadh]] || [[word:shushusashadh|shushusashadh]] || [[word:kukusashadh|kukusashadh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thusashadh|thusashadh]] || [[word:jusashadh|jusashadh]] || [[word:shusashadh|shusashadh]] || [[word:kusashadh|kusashadh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thusashadh|thusashadh]] || [[word:jusashadh|jusashadh]] || [[word:shusashadh|shusashadh]] || [[word:kusashadh|kusashadh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thesashadh|thesashadh]] || [[word:jesashadh|jesashadh]] || [[word:shesashadh|shesashadh]] || [[word:kesashadh|kesashadh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothosashadh|thothosashadh]] || [[word:jojosashadh|jojosashadh]] || [[word:shoshosashadh|shoshosashadh]] || [[word:kokosashadh|kokosashadh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thosashadh|thosashadh]] || [[word:josashadh|josashadh]] || [[word:shosashadh|shosashadh]] || [[word:kosashadh|kosashadh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thosashadh|thosashadh]] || [[word:josashadh|josashadh]] || [[word:shosashadh|shosashadh]] || [[word:kosashadh|kosashadh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠsashadh|thĂŠsashadh]] || [[word:jĂŠsashadh|jĂŠsashadh]] || [[word:shĂŠsashadh|shĂŠsashadh]] || [[word:kĂŠsashadh|kĂŠsashadh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathasashadh|thathasashadh]] || [[word:jajasashadh|jajasashadh]] || [[word:shashasashadh|shashasashadh]] || [[word:kakasashadh|kakasashadh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thasashadh|thasashadh]] || [[word:jasashadh|jasashadh]] || [[word:shasashadh|shasashadh]] || [[word:kasashadh|kasashadh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thasashadh|thasashadh]] || [[word:jasashadh|jasashadh]] || [[word:shasashadh|shasashadh]] || [[word:kasashadh|kasashadh]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shasashadh|shasashadh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshasashadh|goshasashadh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishasashadh|gokishasashadh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shasashadhnĂŒ|shasashadhnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshasashadhnknĂŒ|goshasashadhnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishasashadhnĂŒ|gokishasashadhnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shasashadhshĂ«|shasashadhshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshasashadhnkshĂ«|goshasashadhnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishasashadhshĂ«|gokishasashadhshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasashadhro|shasashadhro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasashadhnkro|goshasashadhnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasashadhro|gokishasashadhro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shasashadhmu|shasashadhmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasashadhnkmu|goshasashadhnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasashadhmu|gokishasashadhmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shasashadhsher|shasashadhsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshasashadhnksher|goshasashadhnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishasashadhsher|gokishasashadhsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shasashadhng|shasashadhng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshasashadhnkng|goshasashadhnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishasashadhng|gokishasashadhng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shasashadhya|shasashadhya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshasashadhnkya|goshasashadhnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishasashadhya|gokishasashadhya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shasashadhyam|shasashadhyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshasashadhnkyam|goshasashadhnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishasashadhyam|gokishasashadhyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shasashadhnĂŒshĂ«|shasashadhnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshasashadhnknĂŒshĂ«|goshasashadhnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishasashadhnĂŒshĂ«|gokishasashadhnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasashadhnĂŒro|shasashadhnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasashadhnknĂŒro|goshasashadhnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasashadhnĂŒro|gokishasashadhnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasashadhnĂŒmu|shasashadhnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasashadhnknĂŒmu|goshasashadhnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasashadhnĂŒmu|gokishasashadhnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shasashadhshĂ«nĂŒ|shasashadhshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshasashadhnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshasashadhnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishasashadhshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishasashadhshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasashadhshĂ«ro|shasashadhshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasashadhnkshĂ«ro|goshasashadhnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasashadhshĂ«ro|gokishasashadhshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasashadhshĂ«mu|shasashadhshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasashadhnkshĂ«mu|goshasashadhnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasashadhshĂ«mu|gokishasashadhshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shasashadhronĂŒ|shasashadhronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshasashadhnkronĂŒ|goshasashadhnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishasashadhronĂŒ|gokishasashadhronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shasashadhroshĂ«|shasashadhroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshasashadhnkroshĂ«|goshasashadhnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishasashadhroshĂ«|gokishasashadhroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasashadhromu|shasashadhromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasashadhnkromu|goshasashadhnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasashadhromu|gokishasashadhromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shasashadhmunĂŒ|shasashadhmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshasashadhnkmunĂŒ|goshasashadhnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishasashadhmunĂŒ|gokishasashadhmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shasashadhmushĂ«|shasashadhmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshasashadhnkmushĂ«|goshasashadhnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishasashadhmushĂ«|gokishasashadhmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasashadhmuro|shasashadhmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasashadhnkmuro|goshasashadhnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasashadhmuro|gokishasashadhmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
